title: FormatEmail — standard
description: FormatEmail (format `email`); enforces the baked email pattern plus `minLength` 7 / `maxLength` 254
notes: Rejected: no `@` (`not-an-email`), too short (`a@b.co`, below `minLength` 7), missing local part (`@example.com`), missing domain (`john@`), a TLD-less domain (`john@example`), an embedded space (`john doe@example.com`), and the empty string. The format error is `{name: email}` (no `val`).
